title: Azulite's Create Pack
description: A Create-focussed building pack, with many Create addons, interactive contraptions with Valkyrien Skies and more.
body:
This is my Create building modpack, which aims to be an ultimate kitchen-sink modpack for anyone interested in complex Create engineering! It features the mod itself and addons such as:
- Create: Big Cannons
- Valkyrien Skies
- Create: Interactive (Valkyrien Skies/Create compatability)
- Create: Steam n' Rails
- Create: Utilities

Just to name a few!

The modpack will be updated in the future to include any more mods I deem useful to the experience.
